description: Canonical list of the 15 Nannymud guilds, each mapped to a potential playable class archetype for the game. MVP selects 6 of these (marked mvp: true).

guilds.loreSummary: The default starting guild — a welcoming hall for newcomers. Members learn the fundamentals of combat, exploration and survival before committing to a specialist path.
guilds.fantasy: A versatile jack-of-all-trades with a balanced mix of melee, ranged, and survival abilities. Great onboarding class.

guilds.loreSummary: Noble warriors bound by the four virtues — Compassion, Valor, Honor, Honesty. Inspired by the 12th-century Templars and Arthurian Round Table. Defenders of Camelot hold the highest rank.
guilds.fantasy: Armored frontline protector with sword-and-shield kit. Big taunts, damage mitigation, point-blank AoE.
guilds.ipNote: Arthurian references are public domain. 'Camelot' and 'Templar' safe.

guilds.loreSummary: Scholars of the arcane arts. Channel the elements through rune, wand and incantation. The Simyarin of the island Ganennon are the most disciplined branch.
guilds.fantasy: Squishy ranged caster. Skillshot projectiles, AoE nukes, a defensive blink.
guilds.ipNote: Safe. 'Simyarin' is a Nannymud original coinage, keep.

guilds.loreSummary: Keepers of the Old Wood and Bamboo Forest. Channel life-force of grove and glade. Healers and shapechangers.
guilds.fantasy: Primary healer with shapeshift offensive form. Heal-over-time, cleanse, party regen. Secondary: bear/wolf form for melee burst.

guilds.loreSummary: Trackers and rangers of the Dragonspine wilderness. Masters of bow, trap, and pet companionship.
guilds.fantasy: Ranged physical DPS with a pet. Skillshot autos, traps for zone control, volley ultimate.

guilds.loreSummary: Ascetics of the Cathbad Abbey. Train body as weapon. Combine martial discipline with prayer.
guilds.fantasy: Fast unarmed melee assassin. Dash-gap-closer, combo strikes, brief untargetable frame.

guilds.loreSummary: Berserkers from the frozen north. Sail from Iceblink's hold in longships, raid the Sea of Claws coasts.
guilds.fantasy: Axe-swinging berserker. Rage meter, lifesteal, ultimate that grants temporary immortality.

guilds.loreSummary: Divine seers. Channel foresight and the word of their chosen god. Can buff allies or curse enemies.
guilds.fantasy: Off-healer / buffer / debuffer. Smite, bless, prophetic shield that predicts incoming damage.

guilds.loreSummary: Ancient secretive bloodline. No one knows when they first arrived. They feed silently, spread slowly. Have weaknesses to sunlight.
guilds.fantasy: Lifesteal-focused stalker. Stealth in shadows, burst combo with lifesteal, weakness during daytime zones.

guilds.loreSummary: Worshippers of the Great Old One. Cast maddening whispers, summon tentacled horrors, sanity is a resource.
guilds.fantasy: DoT-focused caster with mind-control and summoning. Sanity mechanic — too many spells cast too fast causes self-damage.
guilds.ipNote: RENAME. Cthulhu is technically public domain but brand is heavily associated. Rename to 'Cult of the Deep Sleeper' or 'Cult of the Drowned'. Keep tentacle / sanity aesthetic.

guilds.loreSummary: Bloodthirsty warriors who exist only to kill. Hardest guild to play — every action demands aggression.
guilds.fantasy: Aggressive melee bruiser. Damage scales with recent kills. Cannot retreat — passive that punishes running away.
guilds.ipNote: RENAME. 'Khorne' is Games Workshop IP. Rename to 'Champions of the Red Throne' or 'Blood Pact'. Keep 'kills for the kill god' aesthetic but serial-numbers-filed-off.

guilds.loreSummary: Sworn to extinguish all light from the world of Nanny. Mages of shadow and cold.
guilds.fantasy: Shadow/ice caster. Slows, roots, cold DoTs, darkness zones that obscure vision.

guilds.loreSummary: Knowledge-based guild. As you learn recipes you can cook dishes that grant powerful stat buffs to yourself and allies.
guilds.fantasy: Support utility. Craft consumables between matches that grant team buffs. Weak solo combat. A novelty class for later expansions.
guilds.ipNote: Safe. Fun novelty guild, not MVP.

guilds.loreSummary: Outcasts afflicted with the rotting curse. Spread disease on touch. Shunned by all safe towns.
guilds.fantasy: Melee DoT bruiser. Auras of contagion. Always PK-flagged; cannot enter safe hubs. Extreme high-risk high-reward class.
guilds.ipNote: Safe. Sensitive subject historically; frame strictly as fantasy curse, avoid real-world disease parallels.

guilds.loreSummary: Elite endgame guild. Requires completing many quests in other guilds. Members are the pinnacle of Nannymud achievement.
guilds.fantasy: Prestige/capstone class unlocked at max level after mastering another class. Hybrid kit that pulls one signature ability from each base class.

designNote: Six MVP classes give us the full MOBA role trinity coverage: tank (Knight), melee-dps (Monk), ranged-dps (Mage, Hunter), support/healer (Druid), and generalist onboarding (Adventurer). Each has a distinct resource type to prevent homogenization.
